description: Returns a Specific Recycled Action Plan Item for a given Project

created_at.description: Time the Plan Item Assignee was created

is_holding.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the assignee is necessary to sign for a hold point

is_locked.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the assignee was added prior to an Action Plan's approval

role.description: Role of the Plan Item Assignee

updated_at.description: Time the Plan Item Assignee was updated

created_at.description: Time the Recycled Action Plan Item was created

deleted_at.description: Time the Recycled Action Plan Item was deleted

description.description: Description of the Recycled Action Plan Item

due_at.description: Due Date of the Recycled Action Plan Item

holding_type.description: Action Plan Item holding type specifies whether the current item holds all the succeeding items in the section or the plan

is_blocked.description: Indicates whether current Action Plan Item is blocked by another Action Plan Item

is_blocking.description: Indicates whether current Action Plan Item is blocking other Action Plan Items

plan_id.description: Plan ID of the Recycled Action Plan Item belongs to

position.description: Postion of the Recycled Action Plan Item

plan_section_id.description: Plan Section ID the Recycled Action Plan Item belongs to

id.description: Status ID for the Action Plan Item (1 - open, 2 - in_progress, 3 - delayed, 4 - closed)

title.description: Title of the Recycled Action Plan Item

updated_at.description: Time the Recycled Action Plan Item was updated
